title: KINNECT EVENTS - 211info
text: KINDRED MATTERS KINNECT EVENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sibling recreational events that foster meaningful connections and positive childhood memories through activities like swimming, bowling, and outdoor adventures, and sharing a meal Eligibility: Youth must be living separated from at least one sibling Hours: Saturdays or Sundays for 2-3 hours Email (458) 888-9356 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (458) 888-9356 Main phone Main phone (458) 888-9356 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application form AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Arts and Crafts Instruction * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - FAMILY CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SIBLING CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
